Oodinals Beta
OODL Protocol

Oodinals

Inscribe, list, and trade on Bitcoin. No backend, no custody, no middlemen.

Inscribe

Put anything on Bitcoin — images, text, HTML, 3D, BRC-20. Brotli compression, parent-child, batch.

Marketplace

Browse and buy inscriptions peer-to-peer. Every trade settles atomically — no middleman.

List & Sell

Create trustless listings with one wallet signature. Your inscription never leaves your custody.

Collections

On-chain collection registry. Launch, curate, and manage — all inscribed on Bitcoin.

Open Stores

Your own decentralised storefront on Bitcoin. No platform fee, no approval needed.

Bitmaps

Bitmap metaverse integration. Inscribe blocks, create parcels, trade via OODL.
